subject: Particle export
body:
Hi Dimitry,
If I want to export filtered particle picks for relion, do I set the filter 
in Warp (i.e. I only want particles from microgrphs with 3A CTF fit or 
better), then go to "export particles". Will this create a star file that I 
can then run 2D classification in relion?
Many thanks!
Stay safe!
-Chris
